description:
When a landing attempt passes review but then fails during the final rebase/merge step, a subsequent `land` retry should not send the change back through review again.

Scope:
- capture/persist the distinction between review success and a later integration failure
- ensure a retry resumes from the correct post-review stage
- add regression coverage for: review passes -> final rebase/merge fails -> retry lands without re-review

Notes:
- this shares landing-state logic with the other landing-flow tickets; prefer landing-lane work to happen in the same branch/worker sequence
- preserve existing review behavior for tickets that truly need re-review

Definition of done:
- tests added/updated under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__`
- `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
title: Do not re-queue review after review passed and `land` only failed at final rebase/merge
